scenarios.notes: Target contest/speculation selection and verification state. Name both teams with home/away roles.
Fresh clone or tagged release; install/build/smoke results; observed SDK/CLI/Node/Yarn versions.
Strict non-interactive auth result per wallet role; balance sufficiency for the planned window.
Only bounded low-value allowances observed/created; no unlimited approvals.
Dry-run selected only the intended target and produced quote intents with no writes.
Count, per-commitment risk, expiry, and intended-target-only scope of live commitments.
Fill transaction outcome with taker/maker risk amounts and sides named per the Team Identity Rule.
Fill event source observed in telemetry; canonical legacy fill sources observed (expected: none).
Public/API live commitment exposure after shutdown and expiry grace; orphan process scan result.
State whether the probe was read-only/dry-run and whether it proves cursor resume or only no-phantom-exposure.
External final score source and result, score/settle/claim transactions, final dry-run and process checks. Use status deferred when the artifact is cut before the game is final.
